entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Nutrient rich food legume cultivated mainly as rainfed crop in arid and semiarid regions of India

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Climatic condition causing significant yield losses in chickpea

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where chickpea is cultivated in arid and semiarid regions

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used as a measure of productivity

entities.name: STABILITY
entities.description: The consistency of a genotype's performance across different environments

entities.name: AMMI MODEL
entities.description: Additive Main Effects and Multiplicative Interaction model used for stability analysis

entities.name: GGE BIPLOT METHOD
entities.description: Genotype and Genotype by Environment biplot method used for stability analysis

entities.name: MULTI-ENVIRONMENT EVALUATION TRIAL
entities.description: Trial conducted across five environments to identify superior and locally adaptable genotypes

entities.name: G×E INTERACTION
entities.description: The interaction between genotype and environment that affects trait expression

entities.name: PALEM
entities.description: Environment E2 where specific adaptability of genotype G24 was observed

entities.name: WARANGAL
entities.description: Environment E5 identified as the best suited for potential expression of grain yield
